rulings.Calendar Matter: Notice Of Motion And Motion To Compel Further Responses To Request For Production Of Documents And For Sanctions
rulings.Rulings: The motion to compel further responses to request for production of documents is granted. The parties must meet and confer prior to the hearing tomorrow at 2:30 p.m. to discuss what documents remain to be produced. Once the Court has heard arguments as to the amount of sanctions, the matter will be submitted.

rulings.Case Title: IN RE: BJ HERRAN REVOCABLE TR ESTABLISHED 4/13/2006
rulings.Calendar Matter: Respondent Charles Odenthals Notice Of Demurrer And Demurrer To First Amended Complaint; Memorandum Of Points And Authorities In Support Thereof
rulings.Rulings: The parties should meet and confer regarding the effect, if any, of the court's prior ruling and any subsequent amendment to the complaint. If the parties cannot reach any agreement, then they should appear tomorrow to argue.
